titleStmt.title: SII 20.105: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 105. (B.K. No. 42 of 1937-38.) MAṆṆŪR, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in front of the Bhīmēśvara temple on the hillock called Bhīmēśvara-beṭṭa.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1056, Ānanda, Āshāḍha, Amāvāsye, Solar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1134, July 23, Monday.

The inscription records a gift of land and house to god Svayaṁbhū Bhīmēśvaradēva by certain gāvuṇḍas whose names are lost. It refers to a Daṇḍanāyaka and to a prabhu of Maṇiyūr. The king is stated to have been ruling from his capital at Kalyāṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© © namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōka
malladēva vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ kalyāṇada nele
vīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā rājyaṁgeyu
tta(ṁ)mire . svasti śrīmatu bhūlōkamalladēvaśrīpā
dapadmōpajīviyappa śrī ḍenāya
karuṁ śrīmatu
karu maṇiyūra prabhu gāuṁ
ḍanuṁ nāgagāuṇḍanuṁ kaṁ kariyya
jīyyarige praje śrīma
tu sakavarṣada 1056 neyānanda saṁvatsarada Ā
śāḍadamavase sūryagrahaṇadalu śrīsvayaṁbhu
bhīmēśvaradēvargge sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 40
maḷava mattaru 2 hannirkkayya maneyaṁ Intī dharmmama
pratipāḷsidaranantapuṇyamaṁ paḍevaru . vī dharmavaṁ
kiḍsidavaru śirigaṁgātīradalu praje brāhmaṇaru
maṁ kōṭi kavileymaṁ taṁma svahastadiṁ koṁda pāpamaṁ dakkuvaru
svadattaṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvva
rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
